probes.name: invoice_deadline_end_of_month
probes.prompt: I've got 12 invoices sitting on my desk that need to be checked and input into the new KsEF registration system before the end of this month. Also I still need to learn how the new invoice registration system works. Mark the old scanning task as done please.
probes.criteria:
Agent is a life-event extractor. A good response identifies at least two extractable events: (1) a deadline-bound task 'input 12 invoices into KsEF system' due by end of current month, and (2) a learning task 'learn new invoice registration system' also due by end of month. Events should have correct Europe/Warsaw timezone context. The completed task ('scanning') should be noted as done for the goal-progress updater.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 6, 12, 21, 31 — invoice scanning/input workflow with end-of-month deadline and task completion marking.

probes.name: master_thesis_competition_search
probes.prompt: Potrzebuję znaleźć wszystkie konkursy na najlepszą pracę magisterską, wiem że jest jeden organizowany przez ABW ale jest ich więcej. Większość właśnie się skończyła ale następne edycje będą pewnie w tych samych miesiącach co 2025. Zbierz wymagania i wyślij na mój prywatny email ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com. Sprawdź też faktyczny tytuł mojej pracy magisterskiej w dokumencie.

All dates should be contextualized to Europe/Warsaw. The event should trigger a goal-progress update for the thesis competition goal.
